ext_description.message: Voyé nenpòt ki pyès Firefox pé wouvè, pap-pap, adan Google Drive a-w.

popup_no_file.message: Pa ni pon pyès pou nou jwenn la

popup_unsupported.message: Paj-lasa pa ni pon fichyé nou pé voyé

popup_local_file.message: Nou pa ka pwan pyès ki anlè owdinatè a'w menm

err_local_file.message: Nou pa ka sipòté pyès ki anlè owdinatè a'w menm. Wouvè fichyé-la depi on URL asi entènèt.

err_unsupported_type.message: Nou pa ka pwan sé kalité pyès-la sa.

err_download_failed.message: Nou pa rivé chajé pyès-la sa : (HTTP $STATUS$).

err_auth_failed.message: Lyannaj-la évè Google pa vwè bout.

err_quota.message: Pa ni asé plas adan Google Drive a-w.

err_network.message: Pwoblèm rézo. Gadé si ou ni on bon konèksyon.

err_upload_failed.message: Voyaj-la pa rivé fèt. Éséyé ankò souplé.

err_private_network.message: Adres rézo privé oben lokal pa pé trété.

err_rate_limit.message: Twòp mèsaj voyé. Tann on ti moman é éséyé ankò.

err_google_server.message: Pwoblèm sèvè Google Drive. Éséyé plita souplé.

onboarding_description.message: Voye PDF, foto é dot fichié ouve an Firefox la dirèk an Google Drive a-w san oken sèvè.

onboarding_feat_formats.message: I ka sipòté PDF, foto, son, vidéo, EPUB é fichié Office.

onboarding_feat_destination.message: I ka sere fichyé-la dirèkteman adan fòldè "Imports Magic Clipper" an Google Drive a-w.

onboarding_feat_security.message: 100% lokal é an sekirite : oken sèvè dèwò, koneksyon dirèk èvè Google OAuth2.

popup_state_downloading_eta.message: An ka chajé fichyé-la… ($PERCENT$%) — i ka rété $ETA$ ($SPEED$)

popup_state_uploading_eta.message: Fichyé-la ka pati an Drive… ($PERCENT$%) — i ka rété $ETA$ ($SPEED$)

popup_state_action_cancel_announce.message: Ou pé annilé voyaj-la si ou vlé.

err_content_mismatch.message: Sèvè-la voyé on répons ki pa bon (paj koneksyon ?). Éséyé ouvè fichyé-la dirèkteman.
err_content_mismatch.description: Error: downloaded content type doesn't match expected type

popup_disconnect_confirm_announce.description: Accessible announcement when disconnect button enters confirm mode

popup_disconnected_status.message: Dékonetè. Klik Anvoyé pou konektè ankò.
